ddls:
CREATE TABLE "competition_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition group (e.g., Boys' 14) */,
  "age_category" TEXT /* Age category of the competition group (e.g., 14) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the competition group (e.g., Boys) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the competition group is active */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the competition group */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the competition group is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competition_lists" (
  "list_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition list */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the competition group the list belongs to */,
  "competition_month" TEXT /* Month of the competition */,
  "competition_year" INTEGER /* Year of the competition */,
  "list_publication_date" TEXT /* Date the list was published */,
  "list_publication_time" TEXT /* Time the list was published */,
  "list_title" TEXT /* Title of the list (e.g., Boys 14 Standings) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the competition list (e.g., Draft, Published, Archived) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the list was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the list */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the list */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_lists_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES competition_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "home_city" TEXT /* City where the athlete is based */,
  "home_district" TEXT /* District where the athlete is based */,
  "home_section" TEXT /* Section where the athlete is based */,
  "home_state" TEXT /* State where the athlete is based */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the athlete */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the athlete */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the athlete */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the athlete's photo */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the athlete is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_home_section FOREIGN KEY ("home_section") REFERENCES sections ("section_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_home_state FOREIGN KEY ("home_state") REFERENCES states ("state_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_home_district FOREIGN KEY ("home_district") REFERENCES districts ("district_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing entry */,
  "list_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition list the standing belongs to */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the athlete */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the athlete in the competition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the standing entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the standing entry was updated */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the standing entry is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("list_id") REFERENCES competition_lists ("list_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section (e.g., Southern, Midwest) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the section */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the section is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district (e.g., Georgia, Chicago) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the district */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the district is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state (e.g., Georgia, California) */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state (e.g., GA, CA) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the state is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)
